web.title: SpeechRecognizer | API reference
web.description: As such this API is not intended to be used for continuous recognition, which would consume a significant amount of battery and bandwidth.

web.title: CallLog.Calls | API reference
web.description: If you want to query the call log and limit the results to a single value, you should append the LIMIT_PARAM_KEY parameter to the content URI.
